name: predictstack
description: A peer-to-peer prediction market platform on Stacks blockchain using STX

scripts.deploy:testnet: clarinet deployments generate --testnet --medium-cost && clarinet deployments apply --testnet --use-on-disk-deployment-plan --no-dashboard
scripts.deploy:mainnet: clarinet deployments generate --mainnet --medium-cost && clarinet deployments apply --mainnet --use-on-disk-deployment-plan --no-dashboard
